nasb.text: At the harvest time he sent a slave to the vine-growers, in order to receive some of the produce of the vineyard from the vine-growers.

esv.text: When the season came, he sent a servant  to the tenants to get from them some of the fruit of the vineyard.

cnv.text: 到了時候，園主派了一個僕人到佃戶那裡，向佃戶收取葡萄園一部分的果子。

ccb.text: “到葡萄成熟时，园主派一个奴仆去收取他该得的一份。

csbs.text: 到了收获的季节，他就派了一个奴仆到那些农夫那里去，好从他们收取葡萄园的果子。
